posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I test to custom field and dynamic mapping.

I succeed use dynamic mapping and custom field.
But I can’t use custom field in dynamic mapping.

I want to create integration app with another application,
So need to mapping field to another application.

How I can use custom field in dynamic mapping?
